relationships.description: ATT&CK Reconnaissance tactic relates to NIST CSF Identify function. Understanding reconnaissance threats informs asset and risk identification.
ATT&CK Initial Access tactic relates to NIST CSF Protect function. Protective controls aim to prevent initial compromise vectors.
ATT&CK Execution tactic relates to NIST CSF Detect function. Detection capabilities must identify malicious code execution.
ATT&CK Persistence tactic relates to NIST CSF Detect function. Monitoring must detect persistence mechanisms like scheduled tasks and autostart entries.
ATT&CK Privilege Escalation tactic relates to NIST CSF Protect function. Access controls and least privilege principles mitigate escalation.
ATT&CK Defense Evasion tactic relates to NIST CSF Detect function. Detection must account for adversary evasion techniques.
ATT&CK Lateral Movement tactic relates to NIST CSF Protect function. Network segmentation and access controls limit lateral movement.
ATT&CK Exfiltration tactic relates to NIST CSF Detect function. Data loss prevention and network monitoring detect exfiltration attempts.
ATT&CK Impact tactic relates to NIST CSF Respond function. Impact techniques (ransomware, destruction) trigger incident response.
ATT&CK Impact tactic relates to NIST CSF Recover function. Recovery planning must address destructive attack impacts.
ATT&CK Command and Control tactic relates to NIST CSF Detect function. Network monitoring must detect C2 communication channels.
ATT&CK Credential Access tactic relates to NIST CSF Protect function. Credential protection controls mitigate credential theft.
ATT&CK Initial Access techniques are mitigated by NIST SP 800-53 Access Control family. Account management and access enforcement prevent unauthorized initial access.
ATT&CK Credential Access techniques are mitigated by NIST SP 800-53 Identification and Authentication family. MFA and credential policies counter credential theft.
ATT&CK Execution techniques are mitigated by NIST SP 800-53 System and Information Integrity family. Malware protection and software integrity controls prevent malicious execution.
ATT&CK Exfiltration techniques are mitigated by NIST SP 800-53 System and Communications Protection family. Boundary protection and transmission confidentiality counter data exfiltration.
ATT&CK Lateral Movement techniques are mitigated by NIST SP 800-53 System and Communications Protection family. Network segmentation limits lateral traversal.
ATT&CK Persistence techniques are mitigated by NIST SP 800-53 Configuration Management family. Configuration baselines and change detection counter unauthorized persistence.
ATT&CK Discovery techniques are detected by NIST SP 800-53 Audit and Accountability family. Audit logging captures discovery activities like account enumeration.
ATT&CK Supply Chain Compromise technique is mitigated by NIST SP 800-53 Supply Chain Risk Management family.
MITRE ATLAS Reconnaissance extends ATT&CK Reconnaissance with AI/ML-specific reconnaissance techniques like model ontology discovery.
MITRE ATLAS Exfiltration extends ATT&CK Exfiltration with AI-specific data theft techniques like model extraction.
MITRE ATLAS Impact extends ATT&CK Impact with AI-specific impact techniques like ML model corruption.
MITRE ATLAS Defense Evasion extends ATT&CK Defense Evasion with AI-specific evasion like guardrail erosion.
ATT&CK Enterprise tactics inform ISO 27000 risk planning by providing a structured threat model of adversary behaviors.
ATT&CK Exploit Public-Facing Application exploits CWE-707 Improper Neutralization weaknesses. Public-facing apps with injection flaws are primary initial access vectors.
ATT&CK Brute Force exploits CWE-287 Improper Authentication. Weak authentication mechanisms are vulnerable to credential brute forcing.
ATT&CK Enterprise tactics inform NIS2 risk management measures by providing structured threat intelligence for risk assessment.
ATT&CK Impact tactics relate to NIS2 incident handling requirements. Impact techniques define the incidents NIS2 requires organizations to detect and report.
